title: vulpia myuros subsp. pseudomyuros
intro: Vulpia myuros subsp. pseudomyuros, also known as False Brome or False Cheatsgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Vulpia myuros subsp. pseudomyuros include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
